meta.notes: Sample/fixture weekly training cycle receipt showing one end-to-end cycle: task selection -> baseline -> candidate -> teacher review -> promotion decision -> regression gate -> curriculum update. This is NOT proof of live weekly automation. Run-object references use the sample fixtures. Private holdout scores are referenced by availability only.

task_selection.selection_reason: Sample fixture: one task from each of the first three phases to illustrate cross-phase coverage in a single cycle.

teacher_review.notes: Sample teacher review: candidate showed clear improvement over baseline. Role manifest properly frozen, evaluation contract matches spec.

promotion_decision.reason: Candidate public score 0.925 cleared the 0.85 promotion threshold. Teacher confirmed the generation matches spec requirements.

actions.description: Clarified holdout refresh cadence constraint based on teacher review feedback.
